data.title: Tim Cook Meets PM Keir Starmer Amid Growing Scrutiny Over Apple And Google's Duopoly In UK
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook met with U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer to discuss Apple's investments and the U.K.'s tech sector, amidst growing scrutiny over Apple and Google's market dominance and regulatory challenges in the country.

Jeff Bezos Prefers Confrontation Over Quick Compromises, Reveals Former VP, Says 'Disagree And Commit' Philosophy Led To Amazon's Growth
data.description: A former Amazon executive has provided rare insights into Jeff Bezos' management philosophy that helped build the e-commerce giant into a $2.4 trillion company.

data.title: Ciena Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Tesla Inching Closer To Launch Cybertruck In China? EV Giant Makes Regulatory Filing After Shooting Down Rumors
data.description: Tesla has spurred speculation about the Cybertruck being introduced in China by reportedly filing with one of China's regulatory bodies.
